magnet.title: The 12-Step GTM Agent Audit Checklist
magnet.hook: Find every manual step in your outbound that an agent should already be doing.

input.company_context: Earleads — GTM engineering for B2B SaaS.
input.target_persona: VP RevOps at Series B SaaS

outline.title: The 12-Step GTM Agent Audit Checklist
outline.subtitle: Find every manual step in your outbound that an agent should already be doing.

sections.heading: Section 1: Audit Setup
bullets: Map your current outbound workflow end-to-end
List every tool that touches a lead
Tag each step manual / semi-automated / fully automated

sections.heading: Section 2: Lead Sourcing
bullets: Are sourcing queries hand-typed or templated?
How often do queries get refreshed?
Who owns the ICP filter logic?

sections.heading: Section 3: Enrichment
bullets: Spot-check enrichment hit rate over the last 30 days
Identify enrichment fields nobody actually uses

outline.cta: Book a 15-minute strategy call to walk through your audit results
